finding_results.notes: Replaced euphemized profanity and coercion with spoken explicit profanity and concrete embodied consequences (wrist twist pain, skinned thumb, impact, breath loss, object scatter).
Named Elsie's desire/fear explicitly and tied it to immediate restraint/action; clarified the social and legal cost of what cannot be spoken.
Rewrote all cited stress reactions with scene-specific physical behaviors to avoid checklist-style stress-tell repetition while preserving character voice pressure responses.
Strengthened causal engine with leverage shifts: (1) collector-at-house risk discovery and (2) immediate external runner warning that compresses timeline and directly sets up Tom's urgent entrance.

summary: Applied all packet findings in-place with minimal collateral churn: removed sanitization at confrontation beats, deepened interior stakes at restraint moments, replaced repeated stress-template language with fresh behavior, and inserted an external pressure turn that tightens causality into Tom's entry while preserving chapter continuity and voice register constraints.
